CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), sales_date DATE);
CREATE TABLE regions (region_id INT, region_name VARCHAR(50));
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) AS previous_amount FROM sales;
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount, 2) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) AS two_days_ago_amount FROM sales;
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) AS previous_amount_or_zero FROM sales;
SELECT r.region_name, s.amount, lag(s.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY r.region_name ORDER BY s.sales_date) AS previous_amount FROM sales s JOIN regions r ON s.id = r.region_id;
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY sales_date) AS same_id_previous_amount FROM sales;
SELECT r.region_name, s.sales_date, s.amount, lag(s.amount, 1, NULL) OVER (PARTITION BY r.region_id ORDER BY s.sales_date) AS previous_amount FROM sales s JOIN regions r ON s.id = r.region_id;
SELECT s1.amount - lag(s1.amount, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY s1.sales_date) AS difference FROM sales s1;
SELECT id, amount, lag(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) + 100 AS adjusted_previous_amount FROM sales;
